'''Camos''' was the sixth and most distant [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Utos system]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by 31 [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="CatCW" />

*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
